generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired Air Force colonel with 30 years in civil defense planning, I've seen firsthand how vital preparedness is for national security. The current administration's cuts to local emergency response funding put us all at risk. We can't afford to wait until disaster strikes - our communities need these resources NOW. #CivilDefenseMatters #NationalSecurityFirst
